description: Detects uninitialized primitive member variables in classes/structs in C++. Simplified from Rust: flags all field_declaration nodes inside class/struct bodies (warning severity) without filtering by primitive type, checking for NSDMI initializers, constructor initializer lists, static members, or NOLINT suppression. Higher false-positive rate -- all class fields are flagged.

flag.message: Class/struct field detected -- verify primitive members have default initializers (int x = 0;) or are initialized in all constructors to avoid indeterminate values
